## BaseSuggestion.events property

The event handler that will be triggered when clicking on a suggestion.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
protected get events(): Partial<XEventsTypes>;
```

## Remarks

\* UserAcceptedAQuery: suggestion.query \* UserSelectedASuggestion: suggestion \* Merges the events defined in the suggestionSelectedEvents prop and also emits them
